title: Cockpit CLI Summary Documentation Alignment

sources.reason: Cockpit, CLI, Summary, and documentation alignment requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: Status, Summary, CLI help, and lifecycle docs must share one fact vocabulary and record not_run evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Generated Cockpit Status remains authoritative; docs must not claim execution evidence that is not recorded.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Cockpit Status exposes version, runtime state, conflicts, rollback, disable, and uninstall fields from the lifecycle fact source.
Summary and docs record upgrade id, manifest hash, counts, migration, snapshot, decisions, verification, and residual risk.
CLI/docs terminology is consistent and unrun tools are represented as not_run.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Users and reviewers need one consistent lifecycle state across generated status, CLI help, Summary, and multilingual documentation.
constraints: Generated status must be produced by command, not hand-edited.
Docs must distinguish proposal, confirmed execution, blocked, partial, and not_run evidence.
No new runtime behavior is introduced.
intent.rationale: Fact-source alignment prevents user-visible status from overstating lifecycle execution.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Align generated Cockpit status, CLI terminology, Summary evidence, and lifecycle documentation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Generated status and Summary share lifecycle facts.
CLI/docs distinguish not_run and completed evidence.
Lifecycle commands and states are terminology-consistent.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
